entries.claim_text: Scalable Diffusion Models with Transformers
entries.quoted_snippet: \title{Scalable Diffusion Models with Transformers}

entries.claim_text: ICCV
entries.quoted_snippet: ICCV 2023 (Oral Presentation)
ICCV 2023

entries.claim_text: William Peebles, Saining Xie
entries.quoted_snippet: Saining Xie

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/facebookresearch/DiT
entries.quoted_snippet: Code and project page available

entries.claim_text: paper
Input specifications for DiT: patchify converts a spatial representation into a sequence of length T = (I/p)^2
entries.quoted_snippet: $T = (I/p)^2$ with hidden dimension $d$

entries.claim_text: The Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture and block variants; adaptive layer norm works best
entries.quoted_snippet: Adaptive layer norm works best.

entries.claim_text: Comparing different conditioning strategies; adaLN-Zero outperforms cross-attention and in-context
entries.quoted_snippet: adaLN-Zero outperforms cross-attention and in-context conditioning at all stages of training.

entries.claim_text: Scaling the DiT model improves FID at all stages of training
entries.quoted_snippet: Scaling the transformer backbone yields better generative models across all model sizes and patch sizes.

entries.claim_text: Transformer Gflops are strongly correlated with FID
entries.quoted_snippet: Transformer Gflops are strongly correlated with FID.

entries.claim_text: DiT-XL/2 is compute-efficient and outperforms all prior U-Net-based diffusion models
entries.quoted_snippet: outperforms all prior U-Net-based diffusion models, like ADM and LDM.

entries.claim_text: 把擴散模型常用的 U-Net 骨幹換成一個直接在潛空間 patch 上運作的 Transformer
entries.quoted_snippet: replacing the commonly-used U-Net backbone with a transformer that operates on latent patches

entries.claim_text: 本文所用的 VAE 直接取自 Stable Diffusion，其編碼器有 8 倍下採樣
entries.quoted_snippet: The VAE encoder has a downsample factor of 8

entries.claim_text: q(x_t|x_0) forward noising process
entries.quoted_snippet: q(x_t|x_0) = \mathcal{N}(x_t; \sqrt{\bar{\alpha}_t}x_0, (1 - \bar{\alpha}_t)\mathbf{I})

entries.claim_text: simple mean-squared error noise prediction loss
entries.quoted_snippet: \mathcal{L}_{simple}(\theta) = ||\epsilon_\theta(x_t) - \epsilon_t||_2^2

entries.claim_text: 額外以完整的變分下界訓練可學習的協方差
entries.quoted_snippet: train $\epsilon_\theta$ with $\mathcal{L}_{simple}$, and train $\Sigma_\theta$ with the full $\mathcal{L}$

entries.claim_text: classifier-free guidance extrapolation
entries.quoted_snippet: + s \cdot (\epsilon_\theta(x_t, c) - \epsilon_\theta(x_t, \emptyset))

entries.claim_text: 沒有 guidance 時 DiT-XL/2 的 FID 只有 9.62
把 $p$ 減半會讓 $T$ 變成四倍
entries.quoted_snippet: halving $p$ will quadruple $T$, and thus \textit{at least} quadruple total transformer Gflops

entries.claim_text: 並把該 MLP 初始化為輸出零向量，使整個 DiT 區塊初始為恆等函數
entries.quoted_snippet: this initializes the full DiT block as the identity function

entries.claim_text: adaLN-Zero 在所有訓練階段都優於 cross-attention 與 in-context
entries.quoted_snippet: The adaLN-Zero block yields lower FID than both cross-attention and in-context conditioning while being the most compute-efficient

entries.claim_text: 把每個 token 線性解碼成 $p \times p \times 2C$ 的張量
entries.quoted_snippet: linearly decode each token into a $p \times p \times 2C$ tensor
for $256\times256\times3$ images, $z$ has shape $32\times32\times4$

entries.claim_text: 於是序列長度變成 1024 個 token、單次前向 524.6 Gflops
entries.quoted_snippet: this XL/2 model processes a total of 1024 tokens after patchifying the $64\times64\times4$ input latent (524.6 Gflops)

entries.claim_text: 本文最重要的實證結論是：DiT 的樣本品質由 Gflops 決定，而非參數量
entries.quoted_snippet: scaling model \textit{Gflops} is actually the key to improved performance

entries.claim_text: 可見很強的負相關
entries.quoted_snippet: We find a strong negative correlation between model Gflops and FID-50K

entries.claim_text: 把先前由 LDM 保持的 3.60 FID 紀錄推進到 2.27
entries.quoted_snippet: decreasing the previous best FID-50K of 3.60 achieved by LDM to 2.27

entries.claim_text: 「U-Net 是否為擴散模型的必要條件」是一個貨真價實、可證偽的科學問題
in-context 449M、cross-attention 598M、adaLN 600M、adaLN-Zero 675M
其「可擴展性」結論是在自己定義的 Gflops 座標軸與 ImageNet class-conditional 這個特定基準上成立的
DiT-XL/2 在 TPU v3-256 上以約 5.7 iterations/second 訓練並跑到 7M 步
entries.quoted_snippet: trains at roughly 5.7 iterations/second on a TPU v3-256 pod
